name: herbascan-root
description: Root project for HerbaScan MERN Bridge

scripts.build: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && mkdir -p dist && cp -rv frontend/dist/* dist/ && pip install numpy pillow tflite-runtime
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && node index.js" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
